requirements.task_name: Bookmark the most recent PC patch notes released in the last 14 days
requirements.task_description: Find the latest PC patch notes article from the last 14 days and add it to your reading list so that exactly one qualifying article is saved.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to weekly email updates for Patch Notes and Esports
requirements.task_description: Configure newsletter preferences so that the email address player@example.com receives weekly emails only about Patch Notes and Esports updates.

requirements.task_name: Save the top 3 most-viewed 2025 esports tournament announcements to favorites
requirements.task_description: Filter esports news to 2025 tournament announcements, sort by most viewed, and add the top 3 tournament articles to your favorites list.

requirements.task_name: Comment on the balance patch article with the higher version number
requirements.task_description: Search for balance patch news, compare the first two results by their version numbers in the titles, and post a comment on the article with the higher version number.

requirements.task_name: Configure notifications to only receive server status and maintenance alerts
requirements.task_description: Adjust account notification settings so that only Server Status and Maintenance notifications are enabled, with in-site notifications on and mobile push turned off.

requirements.task_name: Create a reading list of 3 roadmap dev diaries from the last 6 months
requirements.task_description: Filter the developer blog to roadmap posts from the last 6 months, then create a 'Roadmap Reading' collection containing the first 3 articles in oldest-first order.

requirements.task_name: Bookmark the earliest European announcement of the 'Shadow Siege' update
requirements.task_description: Search for 'Shadow Siege' update news, filter to Europe region and update announcements, sort by oldest first, and bookmark the earliest European announcement.

requirements.task_name: Add two beginner guides with 10+ minute read time to a 'New Players' collection
requirements.task_description: Filter game guides to beginner content with a minimum 10-minute reading time, then create a 'New Players' collection containing the top two highest-rated guides.
